overview: A premium, fully responsive salon website for Alex Hair & Skin Studio — a unisex beauty salon in Nagpur. Features a black/white/gold luxury design with sections for services, pricing, gallery, testimonials, contact, and appointment booking.
features: Hero section with tagline and Book Appointment CTA
Services showcase (Haircut, Hair Treatment, Skin Care, Bridal Makeup, Beauty & Grooming)
Customer reviews with 4.0 rating and 500+ reviews
Contact section with Google Map placeholder and social icons
